scope: Discord channel agent integrated with the concurrent proactive/continuous-speech Shell lane

integration_evidence.traceability: REQ 17, UC 13, TEST-S 15, SPEC 11, TEST-F 11; duplicate definitions 0, dead-link 0, orphan 0.
integration_evidence.runtime_overlap: No runtime-path overlap; conflict resolution is limited to requirements, scenario, and V-model registry documentation.

external_acceptance_pending: Live two-channel Discord receive/reply, RESUME/reconnect, dedupe replay, permission loss, and token rotate/revoke.
Real operating-system credential prompt and credential-store lifecycle.
